Verified from verifier.py check: fig_size >= metadata.get('min_figure_size_bytes', 30000)
Verified from verifier.py check: len(report_lines) >= metadata.get('min_report_lines', 5)
Verified from verifier.py script which uses set(range(118, 168)) to evaluate the agent's correct identification of LID domain flexibility.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real biological data (PDB ID: 4AKE, E. coli adenylate kinase) downloaded directly from the RCSB Protein Data Bank. The B-factor distribution confirms that the most flexible residues correctly fall within the expected LID domain. The expected figure and report output paths, the 30KB minimum figure size threshold, the 5-line minimum report length, and the LID domain residue range constraint [118, 167] were all explicitly matched against the evaluation constraints in verifier.py.
